description.ko: 지구의 다양한 지형을 추상적으로 탐구하여 자연 침식의 복잡한 패턴과 손대지 않은 풍경의 생생한 색채를 보여줍니다.
description.en: An abstract exploration of Earth's diverse topography, showcasing the intricate patterns of natural erosion and the vibrant colors of untouched landscapes.

prompt: A high-resolution satellite-style macro shot of Earth's surface, featuring a blend of cracked desert clay, emerald river veins, and swirling golden sand dunes, hyper-realistic, cinematic lighting, 8k, detailed textures.
